results.title: Tim Allen admits to being 'a little more hesitant' for 'Toy Story 5'
results.description: Tim Allen admits to being 'a little more hesitant' for 'Toy Story 5'Tim Allen has finally confirmed that he was reluctant to mark his return to Toy Story 5.For those unaware, Allen is playing the role of Buzz Lightyear in the 2026 American animated adventure comedy-drama film produced by Pixar...
